children.label: A
children.text: transfers the participant’s designated benefit to the corporation or purchases an irrevocable commitment from an insurer in accordance with clause (i) of , andsection 1341(b)(3)(A) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: provides the corporation such information and certifications with respect to such designated benefits or irrevocable commitments as the corporation shall specify.

children.heading: Treatment of transferred assets
children.label: 2 Treatment of transferred assets
children.text: A transfer to the corporation under this section shall be treated as a transfer of assets from a terminated plan to the corporation as trustee, and shall be held with assets of terminated plans for which the corporation is trustee under , subject to the rules set forth in that section.section 1342 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: in any case in which the plan could have distributed the benefit of the missing participant in a single sum without participant or spousal consent under , the corporation shall pay the participant or beneficiary a single sum benefit equal to the designated benefit paid the corporation plus interest as specified by the corporation, andsection 1055(g) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in any other case, the corporation shall pay a benefit based on the designated benefit and the assumptions prescribed by the corporation at the time that the corporation received the designated benefit.

children.heading: Missing participant
children.label: 1 Missing participant
children.text: The term “missing participant” means a participant or beneficiary under a terminating plan whom the plan administrator cannot locate after a diligent search.

children.label: A
children.text: under the plan’s assumptions, in the case of a distribution that can be made without participant or spousal consent under ;section 1055(g) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: under the assumptions of the corporation in effect on the date that the designated benefit is transferred to the corporation, in the case of a plan that does not pay any single sums other than those described in subparagraph (A); or

children.label: C
children.text: under the assumptions of the corporation or of the plan, whichever provides the higher single sum, in the case of a plan that pays a single sum other than those described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Multiemployer plans
children.label: c Multiemployer plans
children.text: The corporation shall prescribe rules similar to the rules in subsection (a) for multiemployer plans covered by this subchapter that terminate under .section 1341a of this title

children.heading: Plans not otherwise subject to subchapter
children.label: d Plans not otherwise subject to subchapter

children.heading: Transfer to corporation
children.label: 1 Transfer to corporation
children.text: The plan administrator of a plan described in paragraph (4) may elect to transfer a missing participant’s benefits to the corporation upon termination of the plan.

children.label: A
children.text: to the corporation, or

children.label: B
children.text: to an entity other than the corporation or a plan described in paragraph (4)(B)(ii).

children.label: A
children.text: in a single sum (plus interest), or

children.label: B
children.text: in such other form as is specified in regulations of the corporation.

children.label: i
children.text: to which the provisions of this section do not apply (without regard to this subsection),

children.label: ii
children.text: which is not a plan described in paragraph (2), (3), (4), (6), (7), (8), (9), (10), or (11) of , andsection 1321(b) of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: which, was a plan described in which includes a trust exempt from tax under section 501(a) of such title, and1section 401(a) of title 26So in original. The comma probably should not appear.1

children.label: i
children.text: has missing participants, and

children.label: ii
children.text: has not provided for the transfer of assets to pay the benefits of all missing participants to another pension plan (within the meaning of ).section 1002(2) of this title

children.heading: Certain provisions not to apply
children.label: 5 Certain provisions not to apply
children.text: Subsections (a)(1) and (a)(3) shall not apply to a plan described in paragraph (4).

children.heading: Regulatory authority
children.label: e Regulatory authority
children.text: The corporation shall prescribe such regulations as are necessary to carry out the purposes of this section, including rules relating to what will be considered a diligent search, the amount payable to the corporation, and the amount to be paid by the corporation.
